items.title_en: Global stock markets move higher as Europe's benchmark hits 52-week high: Live updates
items.title_zh: 欧洲基准触及 52 周新高，全球股市走高：实时更新
items.desc_en: Europe's Stoxx 600 moved higher Friday, following Asia-Pacific markets, as investors continued rotating out of technology stocks, tracking declines in the U.S.
items.desc_zh: 欧洲斯托克 600 指数周五跟随亚太市场走高，投资者继续撤出科技股，追随美国股市的下跌。

items.title_en: Ford achieves quality milestone, as CEO targets flawless new vehicle launches
items.title_zh: 福特实现质量里程碑，首席执行官目标是完美推出新车
items.desc_en: Ford CEO Jim Farley told CNBC that the automaker has learned from its past quality and recall issues, which have hurt its earnings and stained its reputation.
items.desc_zh: 福特首席执行官吉姆·法利 (Jim Farley) 告诉 CNBC，该汽车制造商已经从过去的质量和召回问题中吸取了教训，这些问题损害了其盈利并玷污了其声誉。

items.title_en: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
items.title_zh: 特朗普的“自由 250”在其执政之前吸引了企业赞助商和企业
items.desc_en: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.
items.desc_zh: 与联邦利益相关的公司——包括波音、洛克希德·马丁和甲骨文——正在赞助一项与特朗普结盟的活动，庆祝美国 250 岁生日。

items.title_en: Manhattan luxury real estate sales hold firm despite fears of a 'Mamdani effect'
items.title_zh: 尽管担心“马姆达尼效应”，曼哈顿豪华房地产销售仍保持坚挺
items.desc_en: A month after the passage of a tax on second homes in New York City, brokers and analysts said sales of luxury real estate remain strong.
items.desc_zh: 纽约市第二套房税通过一个月后，经纪人和分析师表示，豪华房地产的销售仍然强劲。

items.title_en: American Express and Chase move luxury lounge wars beyond the airport
items.title_zh: 美国运通和大通将豪华休息室大战转移到机场之外
items.desc_en: Credit card companies are increasingly offering access to lounges and perks at festivals and sporting events, often exclusively for premium cardholders.
items.desc_zh: 信用卡公司越来越多地在节日和体育赛事期间提供休息室和福利，通常专门针对高级持卡人。

items.title_en: Ukrainian woman named by Interpol as main suspect in Monaco bomb attack
items.title_zh: 国际刑警组织将乌克兰妇女列为摩纳哥炸弹袭击的主要嫌疑人
items.desc_en: Monaco's prosecutor's office says the suspect is no longer in Monaco.
items.desc_zh: 摩纳哥检察官办公室表示，嫌疑人已不在摩纳哥。

items.title_en: Nasa launches mission to save falling space telescope
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局启动拯救坠落太空望远镜的任务
items.desc_en: A Nasa-funded robot has blasted off to catch a falling telescope in mid-orbit and blast it back to safety before it burns up.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局资助的一个机器人已发射升空，以接住中轨坠落的望远镜，并在其燃烧之前将其炸回安全地带。

items.title_en: France records 2,025 excess deaths at peak of heatwave as Europe braces for more extreme weather
items.title_zh: 法国在热浪高峰期超额死亡 2,025 人，欧洲正准备迎接更极端的天气
items.desc_en: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.
items.desc_zh: 预报员警告未来几天非洲大陆将出现进一步的极端气温。

items.title_en: At least 32 dead after overcrowded bus plunges into ravine in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦超载巴士坠入山沟 至少32人死亡
items.desc_en: The bus was travelling from Quetta to Peshawar, when it crashed in the Dana Sar mountain range.
items.desc_zh: 这辆巴士当时正从奎达开往白沙瓦，在达纳萨尔山脉坠毁。

items.title_en: Gold prices set for first weekly rise in a month as investors scale back Fed rate hike bets
items.title_zh: 随着投资者缩减美联储加息押注，金价将出现一个月来首次周上涨
items.desc_en: The metal was boosted as investors scaled back their bets on a looming rate hike.
items.desc_zh: 由于投资者缩减了对迫在眉睫的加息的押注，金价受到提振。

items.title_en: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
items.title_zh: 伊朗开始公开哀悼二月份遇害的阿亚图拉
items.desc_en: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.
items.desc_zh: 阿里·哈梅内伊的遗体将于周五起在德黑兰大摩萨拉安放，随后举行为期数天的葬礼。

items.title_en: Extreme heat wave threatens U.S. power grids and July 4 travel
items.title_zh: 极端热浪威胁美国电网和7月4日旅行
items.desc_en: The heat wave threatens to overwhelm U.S. grids and may force some to change their plans on one of the busiest travel weeks of the year.
items.desc_zh: 热浪可能会淹没美国电网，并可能迫使一些人在一年中最繁忙的旅行周之一改变计划。

items.title_en: Oman walks a diplomatic tightrope over Strait of Hormuz fees, creating a ‘blind spot’ for markets
items.title_zh: 阿曼在霍尔木兹海峡收费问题上走外交钢丝，为市场创造了“盲点”
items.desc_en: Oman is using strategic ambiguity as talks over possible Strait of Hormuz fees raise legal, diplomatic and oil market concerns.
items.desc_zh: 由于有关可能的霍尔木兹海峡费用的谈判引发了法律、外交和石油市场的担忧，阿曼正在利用战略模糊性。

items.title_en: Weak jobs growth and easing oil prices reinforce expectations for Fed pause, analysts say
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，就业增长疲软和油价下跌强化了美联储暂停的预期
items.desc_en: U.S. Fed is unlikely to raise interest rates for now, amid lower oil prices and eased tensions in the Middle East, analysts say.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，由于油价下跌和中东紧张局势缓和，美联储目前不太可能加息。

items.title_zh: 上诉法院阻止特朗普政府在不保释的情况下扣押移民超过 90 天 - 福克斯新闻

items.title_zh: 澳大利亚官员要求粉丝尊重尼尔的隐私，尼尔是一只制造麻烦的海豹 - NPR
items.desc_en: Australian officials ask fans to respect the privacy of Neil, a trouble-making seal  NPRA 1,000kg mammal is wreaking havoc in Tasmania – and Neil the seal is loved for it  The GuardianIs Neil the seal
items.desc_zh: 澳大利亚官员要求粉丝尊重尼尔的隐私，尼尔是一只惹麻烦的海豹，NPRA 重达 1,000 公斤的哺乳动物正在塔斯马尼亚造成严重破坏 - 海豹尼尔因此而受到喜爱《卫报》是海豹尼尔

items.title_en: Rafael Nadal talks tennis prize money, his hotels, and what sports taught him about business
items.title_zh: 拉斐尔·纳达尔谈论网球奖金、他的酒店以及体育教会他的商业知识
items.desc_en: Rafael Nadal opened his fourth Zel hotel as he expands into hospitality, education and sports after retiring from tennis.
items.desc_zh: 拉斐尔·纳达尔 (Rafael Nadal) 从网球退役后将业务扩展到酒店、教育和体育领域，开设了他的第四家泽尔酒店 (Zel hotel)。

items.title_en: Instagram running ads promoting child sexual abuse material in India, BBC finds
items.title_zh: BBC 发现 Instagram 在印度投放宣传儿童性虐待内容的广告
items.desc_en: The ads use terms including “rape” and “child video” and link to content on the messaging app Telegram.
items.desc_zh: 这些广告使用了“强奸”和“儿童视频”等术语，并链接到消息应用 Telegram 上的内容。

items.title_en: Venezuela quake toll climbs to 2,595 as damage estimates mount after strongest tremor in a century
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数攀升至 2,595 人，损失估计在百年来最强烈的地震后增加
items.desc_en: Death toll from twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela jumped to 2,595, as rescue operations continued after the country's strongest tremors in over a century.
items.desc_zh: 委内瑞拉发生的两次地震造成的死亡人数跃升至 2,595 人，在该国遭受一个多世纪以来最强烈的地震后，救援行动仍在继续。

items.title_en: On the Strait of Hormuz, BBC finds seized ships and shark fishermen as uneasy calm returns
items.title_zh: 在霍尔木兹海峡，随着不安的平静回归，BBC 发现了被扣押的船只和鲨鱼渔民
items.desc_en: The BBC visits Bandar Abbas to see how the US-Israeli war with Iran has affected everyday life in the port city.
items.desc_zh: BBC 访问阿巴斯港，了解美以与伊朗的战争如何影响这座港口城市的日常生活。

items.title_zh: 美国就业数据疲软，道琼斯指数跃升至收盘新高，纳斯达克指数因芯片股下跌 - 路透中文网
items.desc_en: Dow jumps to record closing high after soft US jobs data, Nasdaq down with chip shares  ReutersDow jumps nearly 600 points to record close; Nasdaq slides as chip stocks suffer: Live updates  CNBCThe R

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: A mayor in Japan announced her maternity leave - and got the whole country talking
items.title_zh: 日本市长宣布休产假，引起全国热议
items.desc_en: In the face of criticism, Shoko Kawata, 35, says she loves her job and is proud to be taking time off to have a baby.
items.desc_zh: 面对批评，35 岁的川田祥子 (Shoko Kawata) 表示，她热爱自己的工作，并为能抽出时间生孩子而感到自豪。

items.title_en: Ebola treatments trial begins in the Democratic Republic of Congo
items.title_zh: 埃博拉治疗试验在刚果民主共和国开始
items.desc_en: According to WHO data, there have been 1,406 confirmed cases of the disease in DRC, with 301 suspected cases and 438 deaths.
items.desc_zh: 根据世界卫生组织的数据，刚果民主共和国已有1,406例确诊病例，其中疑似病例301例，死亡438例。

items.title_en: President Donald Trump to sit down for exclusive interview with CNBC: Live updates
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统将接受 CNBC 独家专访：实时更新
items.desc_en: Trump's interview comes as he prepares to celebrate the 250th birthday of the U.S. on July 4 with an event and fireworks on the National Mall in Washington.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普接受采访之际，他正准备于 7 月 4 日在华盛顿国家广场举办活动并燃放烟花来庆祝美国建国 250 周年。

items.title_en: Trump Accounts get a boost from employer contributions — Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are the latest to offer matching programs
items.title_zh: 特朗普账户因雇主缴款而得到提升——高盛和摩根士丹利是最新提供匹配计划的公司
items.desc_en: The growing list of companies that will match contributions to Trump Accounts for their employees now includes Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley.
items.desc_zh: 现在，越来越多的公司将为员工提供与特朗普账户相匹配的捐款，其中包括高盛和摩根士丹利。

items.title_en: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
items.title_zh: 特朗普在关税逆转推动反弹之前收购了苹果、英伟达等科技巨头
items.desc_en: The day before President Donald Trump walked back his tariff policy turned out to be one of his busiest days of 2025 for stock buying.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统收回关税政策的前一天是他 2025 年股票购买最繁忙的日子之一。

items.title_en: Killers of British couple in South Africa sentenced to life
items.title_zh: 南非杀害英国夫妇的凶手被判终身监禁
items.desc_en: The pair had been collecting rare plants and seeds before their bodies were found days later in a river.
items.desc_zh: 几天后，两人的尸体在河中被发现，此前他们一直在采集稀有植物和种子。

items.title_en: Amazon has deployed enough satellites to launch Leo service later this year
items.title_zh: 亚马逊已部署足够的卫星，将于今年晚些时候推出 Leo 服务
items.desc_en: Leo will compete with SpaceX's Starlink, which had a four-year start over Amazon and has more than 10,000 satellites in its constellation.
items.desc_zh: Leo 将与 SpaceX 的 Starlink 竞争，后者比亚马逊早了四年，其星座中拥有超过 10,000 颗卫星。

items.title_en: Bomb blast at Damascus cafe kills six, Syrian state media say
items.title_zh: 叙利亚官方媒体称，大马士革咖啡馆发生爆炸，造成六人死亡
items.desc_en: There was no immediate claim for the bombing at a cafe close to the Palace of Justice, a major government building.
items.desc_zh: 目前还没有立即就发生在主要政府大楼司法宫附近的一家咖啡馆发生的爆炸事件提出索赔。

items.desc_zh: 与 GitHub Copilot 大声交谈

items.title_en: Venezuela quake survivor pulled out alive after eight days
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震幸存者八天后生还
items.desc_en: Hernán Gil was trapped under a collapsed multi-storey car park, and encouraged them as they inched closer to him.
items.desc_zh: 埃尔南·吉尔被困在倒塌的多层停车场下，当他们慢慢靠近他时，他鼓励他们。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.desc_zh: 狂犬病感染在加拿大很少见。自1924年以来，该国已有28人死于狂犬病。
